title.en: 'Easy to create divisions' - Kane says England are 'completely together'
title.zh-CN: “轻松创建分区” -凯恩说英格兰“完全在一起”

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane says the squad are "completely together" before their World Cup semi-final against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）表示，在对阵阿根廷的世界杯半决赛之前，球队“完全在一起”。

title.en: Dutch referee dies weeks after being dropped from World Cup
title.zh-CN: 荷兰裁判在世界杯被淘汰数周后去世

summary.en: Dutch football referee Rob Dieperink dies aged 38, weeks after he was dropped from officiating at the World Cup because of a police investigation in the UK.
summary.zh-CN: 荷兰足球裁判罗布·迪佩林克（ Rob Dieperink ）因英国警方调查而被撤销世界杯主席职务，几周后，他去世，享年38岁。

title.en: Chris Sutton's World Cup semi-final predictions
title.zh-CN: 克里斯·萨顿的世界杯半决赛预测

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the semi-final ties at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台的足球专家克里斯·萨顿（ Chris Sutton ）对2026年世界杯的半决赛关系做出了预测。

title.en: BBC experts pick their England World Cup semi-final XI - do you agree?
title.zh-CN: 英国广播公司的专家选择他们的英格兰世界杯半决赛-你同意吗？

summary.en: England are through to the World Cup semi-finals, but who would you pick in your starting XI?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队已进入世界杯半决赛，但您会在首发阵容中选择谁？

title.en: Argentina to wear 'lucky' blue away kit against England
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷将穿着“幸运”蓝色客场球衣对阵英格兰

summary.en: Argentina will wear their navy blue away strip and England their all-white home strip when the two sides face each other in the World Cup semi-finals on Wednesday.
summary.zh-CN: 当双方在周三的世界杯半决赛中面对面时，阿根廷将穿着他们的海军蓝客场地带，英格兰将穿着他们的全白主场地带。

title.en: Borrowed shoes, no Golden Boot - the story of the World Cup's greatest scorer
title.zh-CN: 借鞋，不穿金靴--世界杯最伟大得分手的故事

summary.en: Just Fontaine's record of 13 goals in a single World Cup has stood for decades, but he never played in the tournament again after injury ended his career at the age of 28.
summary.zh-CN: 只是方丹在一届世界杯上打进13球的纪录已经保持了几十年，但在28岁的伤病结束了他的职业生涯后，他再也没有参加过比赛。

title.en: These are unprecedented times - England should enjoy them
title.zh-CN: 这是前所未有的时代-英格兰应该享受它们

summary.en: A record of four semi-finals in the past five international tournaments for England is outstanding. It is time to accept that this is where England belong.
summary.zh-CN: 在过去的五场英格兰国际锦标赛中，有四场半决赛的记录非常出色。现在是时候接受这是英格兰所属的地方了。

title.en: Which Premier League clubs have been hit hardest by World Cup?
title.zh-CN: 哪些英超俱乐部受到世界杯的打击最严重？

summary.en: Which Premier League clubs have carried the biggest World Cup workload?
summary.zh-CN: 哪些英超俱乐部承担了世界杯最大的工作量？

title.en: Liverpool sign England goalkeeper Keating
title.zh-CN: 利物浦签约英格兰门将基廷

summary.en: Liverpool sign England goalkeeper Khiara Keating on a free transfer from Manchester City.
summary.zh-CN: 利物浦签下英格兰守门员基娅拉·基廷（ Khiara Keating ） ，从曼城免费转会。

title.en: England top air miles among semi-finalists - does it matter?
title.zh-CN: 半决赛选手中的英格兰顶级空中里程-这有关系吗？

summary.en: England have travelled far more than rivals France and Argentina as World Cup 2026 tests teams across North America.
summary.zh-CN: 随着2026年世界杯在北美各地对球队进行测试，英格兰的旅行远远超过了竞争对手法国和阿根廷。

title.en: Police chief makes plea to England fans in UK
title.zh-CN: 警察局长向英国的英格兰球迷恳求

summary.en: Police urge England fans at home to follow the example of supporters in the United States after several incidents over the weekend.
summary.zh-CN: 警方敦促英格兰球迷在周末发生多起事件后，效仿美国球迷的榜样。
